type.description: Whether this is a SFIA-mapped skill or a custom/non-SFIA skill

sfia_code.description: SFIA code if type is sfia (e.g. PROG, ARCH). Leave blank for non-SFIA skills.

sfia_category.description: SFIA category — use 'none' for non-SFIA skills

industry_tags.description: Industries this skill is relevant to

levels_supported.description: Proficiency levels supported (e.g. 1-7 for SFIA, or Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced for custom)

is_verified.description: Whether this skill has been verified by platform admins

created_by_user.description: Whether this skill was submitted by a user (vs seeded by the platform)
